title: cheilanthes chaerophylla
intro: Cheilanthes chaerophylla, also known as the rock fern or mountain fern, is a species of fern native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cheilanthes chaerophylla include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Cheilanthes chaerophylla can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and interactions with other medications.
